$jsonSchema.title: PAN-C User
$jsonSchema.description: A registered PAN-C user with their profile and emergency settings

firstName.description: User's first name — shown on HomeScreen greeting

preferredLanguage.description: ISO 639-1 language code for UI and Gemini responses

phoneNumber.description: E.164 format phone number for receiving check-in reminders

safePhrase.description: Phrase used to disarm an active panic alert — stored hashed in production

checkInIntervalMinutes.description: How often (in minutes) the user must check in before an auto-alert fires

audioEnabled.description: Whether to play ElevenLabs audio on panic trigger

locationEnabled.description: Whether to capture GPS coordinates on panic trigger

notificationsEnabled.description: Whether to send SMS/email notifications to contacts

onboardingCompleted.description: Whether the user has completed the initial setup flow

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the user account was created

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last profile update
